Localization.Description: A user logged in to the system

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User from host {src.host} logged out of the system using {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} logged out of the system using {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User in unable to log in to the system from host {src.host} using {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
The user {subject.account.name} in unable to log in to the system from host {src.host} using {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User from host {src.host} logged in to the system using {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Method: {reason}.
The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to the system using {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Method: {reason}.
